case_title: SHANDA LOVE VS. CAPITAL ONE AUTO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBIT (DEFENDANT - CAPITAL ONE AUTO) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-7-2022 AT 1:30PM}
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [FAULKNER TURNER] APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE AUTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-19-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FOR THE NEXT COURT DATE ON 12-19-2022. PLAINTIFF SHANDA LOVE IS PRESENT (UNAUTHORIZED VIA ZOOM). DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE AUTO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY FRANK TURNER, SR. PROCESS MANAGER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATE TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF IS APPEARING AS AN UNAUTHORIZED APPEARANCE. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AND TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTION TO SEND EVIDENCE SUCH AS DOCUMENTS OR PICTURES, WHICH SUPPORT YOUR CASE, SEND THEM TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AND SEND THEM TO THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS IN ADVANCE OF THE NEXT COURT DATE OF 12-19-2022. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE TIMELY ZOOM REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE AUTO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SHANDA LOVE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE AUTO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY FAULKNER TURNER (SR. PROCESS MANAGER). DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
